hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: Look for groups of consecutive move() calls

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: Each group of N consecutive move() calls can become a repeat(N) { move(); } block

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: Count how many move() calls are in each group to get the repeat count

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: The turn functions should stay outside the repeat blocks

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: A repeat block is only shorter when the group has 3 or more calls
